coverage_analysis_memo.body:
COVERAGE ANALYSIS MEMORANDUM

File:          CLM-2023-04471
Exposure:      EXP-2023-04471-REYES-BI
Coverage Part: CP-NWL-2023-BI (Auto Bodily Injury Liability)
Policy:        NWL-CA-024471 / Northwind Logistics, LLC
Loss Date:     03/13/2023
Reviewed:      2025-01-31

─────────────────────────────────────────────
I. COVERAGE ELEMENTS ANALYSIS
─────────────────────────────────────────────

1. POLICY IN FORCE / TEMPORAL CONDITION
The declarations page confirms a policy period of 01/01/2023 12:01 A.M. to 01/01/2024 12:01 A.M. (DOC-001). The loss occurred on 03/13/2023 at 16:42 hrs per HCSO report HCSO-2023-CWY-04471 (DOC-002). The loss date falls squarely within the policy period. Temporal condition: SATISFIED.

2. COVERED AUTO — SYMBOL 7 (SPECIFICALLY DESCRIBED)
The policy uses Symbol 7 for liability, limiting coverage to specifically described autos (DOC-001, Declarations). The schedule at endorsement CA 99 03 lists Unit 14 as a 2019 Freightliner M2-106, VIN 1FVACWDT9KHKL4218, with Liability coverage (DOC-001, Schedule of Covered Autos). The police report identifies the involved vehicle as a 2019 Freightliner M2-106, owned by Northwind Logistics LLC, insured per policy NWL-CA-024471 (DOC-002, V-1). Vehicle identity: CONFIRMED. Symbol 7 condition: SATISFIED.

3. SCHEDULED USE / RADIUS
The schedule classifies Unit 14 as Class 2-D-T-1, radius ≤ 200 miles, use: pickup/delivery — general commodities (DOC-001). The dispatch log confirms Unit 14 was operating on route BR-Mon-A (Brandon corridor) on 03/13/2023, completing deliveries and returning to the Tampa-Causeway terminal (DOC-004). The return leg from Adamo Drive to the Causeway terminal is well within 200 miles. Driver Aliyah confirmed the return trip purpose in his recorded statement (DOC-003). Use class condition: SATISFIED.

4. AUTHORIZED DRIVER / DRIVER ELIGIBILITY
The declarations require all scheduled drivers of Unit 14 to hold a valid CDL Class B and to be 23+ years of age with three years of commercial driving experience (DOC-001). The dispatch log records Aliyah's CDL as #A2241-FL, expiring 2024-08-31 — a Class A CDL, which satisfies the Class B minimum (DOC-004). The police report confirms FL CDL A2241 and DOB 12/04/1975 (age 47 at loss) (DOC-002). The dispatch log confirms Aliyah as the assigned driver with no reassignment (DOC-004). Aliyah stated in the recorded statement that this was his fourth year driving for Northwind, satisfying the three-year experience requirement (DOC-003). The annual MVR has not been produced in the file — this is an open investigative item but does not constitute a present bar to coverage. Driver eligibility: SUBSTANTIALLY SATISFIED; annual MVR confirmation pending.

5. ON-DUTY / AUTHORIZED USE
The dispatch log states: 'Vehicle use during the return leg (Adamo → Causeway terminal) is on-duty per Northwind operations manual §4.3 (truck must be returned to terminal before driver clock-out)' (DOC-004). The incident was logged at 16:42, before the 17:00 scheduled check-out. Aliyah confirmed the return protocol in his recorded statement (DOC-003). There is no evidence of personal deviation. Authorized use condition: SATISFIED.

6. BODILY INJURY TO THIRD PARTY
Claimant Janet Reyes (V-2 driver) complained of neck and lower-back pain at scene and was transported non-emergency to Tampa General, coded 'Possible Injury (C)' (DOC-002). This satisfies the threshold showing of bodily injury to trigger the liability insuring agreement. Medical records have not yet been received — these are necessary for quantum evaluation but do not affect the coverage threshold determination at this stage.

7. LIABILITY — NO APPLICABLE DEDUCTIBLE
The declarations state a $0 deductible for liability coverage (DOC-001). The full $1,000,000 CSL limit is available without deductible offset for this exposure.

8. EXCLUSION REVIEW
No exclusions have been identified in the available file. The contributing factors section of the police report confirms no alcohol, no drugs, and no distraction for V-1 (DOC-002). The loss arose from an inadvertent following-distance error — not an intentional act. Reyes appears to be a member of the public, not an employee of Northwind Logistics (no evidence to the contrary), so the employee injury exclusion does not appear implicated. The full ISO CA 00 01 policy form body has not been produced; a complete exclusion review cannot be certified until that document is available.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
II. OPEN INVESTIGATIVE ITEMS
─────────────────────────────────────────────

a. Full ISO CA 00 01 policy form and all endorsements — needed for complete exclusion review.
b. Annual MVR for Aliyah — required under the declarations' driver eligibility condition; should be obtained from producer Gulf Coast Commercial Brokerage.
c. Medical records and bills from Tampa General and any subsequent treating providers — needed for reserve and quantum evaluation.
d. Confirmation that claimant Reyes is not an employee of Northwind Logistics (to rule out workers' compensation exclusion).
e. Confirmation of no prior notice or late-reporting issues (no evidence of a problem, but not affirmatively documented).

─────────────────────────────────────────────
III. COVERAGE LIMITS APPLICABLE TO THIS EXPOSURE
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Coverage Part:   CP-NWL-2023-BI (Auto BI Liability)
Limit:           $1,000,000 CSL per accident
Deductible:      $0
SIR:             None
Note: UM/UIM is rejected per signed rejection form on file (DOC-001); not applicable here as Reyes is a third-party claimant.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
IV. OUTCOME DISTRIBUTION
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Clean Coverage:   88% — All primary conditions satisfied on the evidence available.
Reservation of Rights:  10% — Pending full form review and annual MVR confirmation.
Denial:           2% — No identified basis; residual only.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
This memorandum reflects analysis of the documents received as of 2025-01-31. It does not constitute a coverage determination or recommendation. The adjuster retains decision authority.

ror_letter.body:
RESERVATION OF RIGHTS LETTER

[DRAFT — FOR ADJUSTER REVIEW AND DECISION ONLY — NOT FOR ISSUANCE WITHOUT ADJUSTER AUTHORIZATION]

Date:    [DATE OF ISSUANCE]
To:      Northwind Logistics, LLC
         4218 Causeway Blvd
         Tampa, FL 33619
Attn:    Risk Manager / Authorized Representative

Re:      Policy No.:   NWL-CA-024471
         Claim No.:    CLM-2023-04471
         Exposure:     EXP-2023-04471-REYES-BI
         Loss Date:    March 13, 2023
         Claimant:     Janet M. Reyes

Dear Northwind Logistics, LLC:

This letter is written on behalf of [CARRIER NAME] in connection with the above-referenced claim arising from an automobile accident on March 13, 2023, at the intersection of Causeway Blvd and Bermuda Ave, Tampa, Florida.

We have received and reviewed the following materials: (1) Declarations Page and policy schedule for Policy No. NWL-CA-024471; (2) Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office Traffic Crash Report No. HCSO-2023-CWY-04471; (3) Recorded statement of driver Marcus Aliyah, taken March 15, 2023; and (4) Northwind Logistics Daily Dispatch Log for March 13, 2023.

I. COVERAGE ACKNOWLEDGMENT (CONDITIONAL)

Based on our review to date, the following coverage conditions appear to be satisfied: (a) the loss date falls within the policy period; (b) Unit 14 (2019 Freightliner M2-106, VIN 1FVACWDT9KHKL4218) is a specifically described covered auto under Symbol 7 with Liability coverage; (c) the vehicle was being operated by assigned driver Marcus Aliyah on an authorized return-to-terminal trip within the scheduled use class; and (d) claimant Reyes sustained apparent bodily injury. Subject to the reservations stated below, we are proceeding with the investigation and adjustment of this claim.

II. BASIS FOR RESERVATION

[CARRIER NAME] hereby reserves all rights under the policy, at law, and in equity, based on the following open items:

1. POLICY FORM REVIEW PENDING. The complete ISO CA 00 01 policy form and all endorsements have not yet been produced for review. Policy No. NWL-CA-024471 is issued on Form CA 00 01 (ISO Commercial Auto) with multiple endorsements (DOC-001). Until the full form is reviewed, we cannot certify that no applicable exclusion or condition limits or precludes coverage for this loss. We reserve our rights under all policy terms, conditions, exclusions, and endorsements.

2. ANNUAL MVR CONFIRMATION PENDING. The declarations page requires: 'All scheduled drivers must hold a valid CDL Class B for Unit 14. Annual MVR pull by Producer. Drivers must be 23 years of age or older with three years documented commercial driving experience' (DOC-001). While the dispatch log reflects a valid CDL for Aliyah (CDL #A2241-FL, exp. 2024-08-31) (DOC-004), the annual MVR pull for the current policy year has not been confirmed as completed or produced. We reserve our rights pending receipt and review of the current-year MVR from producer Gulf Coast Commercial Brokerage, Inc.

3. GENERAL RESERVATION. We further reserve our rights with respect to any additional information developed during the course of the investigation that may bear on coverage.

III. PROCESS STATEMENT

This reservation of rights is issued to protect [CARRIER NAME]'s rights under the policy while the investigation continues. The issuance of this letter does not constitute a denial of coverage, a waiver of any policy term or condition, or an admission of liability. We will continue our investigation and will advise you of our coverage position as additional information is received and reviewed.

You have the right to retain legal counsel of your choosing in connection with this reservation. Please direct any questions or additional documentation to the undersigned.

Sincerely,

[ADJUSTER NAME]
[TITLE]
[CARRIER NAME]
[ADDRESS]
[PHONE / EMAIL]

cc: Gulf Coast Commercial Brokerage, Inc. (Producer)
    File No. CLM-2023-04471

denial_letter.body:
COVERAGE POSITION LETTER — POTENTIAL DENIAL

[DRAFT — FOR ADJUSTER REVIEW ONLY — DENIAL PROBABILITY IS LOW (2%). THIS DRAFT IS PROVIDED AS AUDIT HISTORY PER §7.4. IT SHOULD NOT BE ISSUED UNLESS THE ADJUSTER, AFTER FULL INVESTIGATION, IDENTIFIES A SPECIFIC POLICY BAR TO COVERAGE.]

Date:    [DATE OF ISSUANCE]
To:      Northwind Logistics, LLC
         4218 Causeway Blvd
         Tampa, FL 33619
Attn:    Risk Manager / Authorized Representative

Re:      Policy No.:   NWL-CA-024471
         Claim No.:    CLM-2023-04471
         Exposure:     EXP-2023-04471-REYES-BI
         Loss Date:    March 13, 2023
         Claimant:     Janet M. Reyes

Dear Northwind Logistics, LLC:

This letter is written on behalf of [CARRIER NAME] in connection with the above-referenced claim.

[NOTE TO ADJUSTER: This denial draft is a placeholder. No specific exclusion, condition breach, or coverage bar has been identified in the available file. The denial probability in the coverage analysis is 2%, reflecting only theoretical residual risk from documents not yet received (full policy form body, annual MVR). This letter MUST NOT be issued unless and until a specific, identified policy provision — with verbatim citation — is confirmed as applicable. The specific exclusion or condition breach must be inserted in Section II below before any issuance.]

I. BACKGROUND

We have investigated the loss of March 13, 2023, involving Northwind Logistics Unit 14 (2019 Freightliner M2-106) and claimant Janet M. Reyes at Causeway Blvd and Bermuda Ave, Tampa, Florida, under Policy No. NWL-CA-024471, Form CA 00 01 (ISO Commercial Auto) (DOC-001).

II. BASIS FOR DENIAL

[TO BE COMPLETED BY ADJUSTER UPON IDENTIFICATION OF SPECIFIC POLICY BAR]

After a thorough review of the policy terms and conditions, we have determined that coverage for the above-referenced claim is not available for the following reason(s):

[INSERT SPECIFIC POLICY EXCLUSION, CONDITION, OR PROVISION WITH VERBATIM QUOTE AND PAGE/SECTION REFERENCE]

III. APPLICABLE POLICY LANGUAGE

[INSERT VERBATIM POLICY LANGUAGE]

IV. RIGHTS NOTICE (FLORIDA)

You have the right to consult with an attorney or public adjuster. You may also contact the Florida Department of Financial Services, Division of Consumer Services, at 1-877-693-5236 or www.myfloridacfo.com.

This letter does not waive any other rights, defenses, or policy provisions available to [CARRIER NAME], all of which are expressly reserved.

Sincerely,

[ADJUSTER NAME]
[TITLE]
[CARRIER NAME]
[ADDRESS]
[PHONE / EMAIL]

cc: Gulf Coast Commercial Brokerage, Inc. (Producer)
    File No. CLM-2023-04471
